raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The left end-effector can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table or box_1, and applying downward force will not crush or deform the cardboard box.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is held down against box_1 to prevent shifting while separating the attached interface."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "There is free lateral clearance around the box stack to slide box_2 relative to box_1, and the right end-effector can contact the side of box_2 without hitting box_1 or the table; box_2 is stabilized by the left arm.",
    "Postcondition": "The attachment between box_2 and box_1 is loosened or broken, and box_2 is offset to expose grasping access to box_1."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "box_2",
    "Action concept": "Push",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "A clear area on the tabletop exists to the side of the stack to park box_2, and the right end-effector can continue pushing without causing box_2 to tip; the left arm maintains stabilization as needed.",
    "Postcondition": "box_2 is moved away from directly on top of box_1, leaving box_1 unobstructed from above."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is no longer covered by box_2; both end-effectors have lateral access to opposite sides of box_1 with enough clearance from the table and nearby objects; claws are not used because the box exceeds the claw size limit.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is securely held in a two-arm pinch/embrace grasp and is ready to be lifted."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 5,
    "Target": "box_1",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "box_1 is firmly held; the intended placement location is clear of obstacles on the tabletop.",
    "Postcondition": "box_1 is lifted and placed back down on the table in an accessible, unobstructed position, completing the pickup-and-relocate of the darker box."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The left end-effector can reach the top surface of box_2 without colliding with the table or box_1, and applying downward force will not crush or deform the cardboard box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is held down against box_1 to prevent shifting while separating the attached interface.

parsed_json.Precondition: There is free lateral clearance around the box stack to slide box_2 relative to box_1, and the right end-effector can contact the side of box_2 without hitting box_1 or the table; box_2 is stabilized by the left arm.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The attachment between box_2 and box_1 is loosened or broken, and box_2 is offset to expose grasping access to box_1.

parsed_json.Precondition: A clear area on the tabletop exists to the side of the stack to park box_2, and the right end-effector can continue pushing without causing box_2 to tip; the left arm maintains stabilization as needed.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_2 is moved away from directly on top of box_1, leaving box_1 unobstructed from above.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is no longer covered by box_2; both end-effectors have lateral access to opposite sides of box_1 with enough clearance from the table and nearby objects; claws are not used because the box exceeds the claw size limit.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is securely held in a two-arm pinch/embrace grasp and is ready to be lifted.

parsed_json.Precondition: box_1 is firmly held; the intended placement location is clear of obstacles on the tabletop.
parsed_json.Postcondition: box_1 is lifted and placed back down on the table in an accessible, unobstructed position, completing the pickup-and-relocate of the darker box.
